options.name: --backup
options.description:
Backup container volumes before updating
Only works together with the '--update' option

options.name: --backup-location
options.description:
Volumes backup location (absolute/relative 
path)

options.name: --cfg-v1
options.description: Flag for using old configuration file (v1)

options.name: --do-not-start
options.description: Don't start the container after creation

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
Don't apply any changes, just print the 
commands

options.name: --force
options.description:
Force container recreation (update), even if the 
container is on the latest image
Only works together with the '--update' option

options.name: --name
options.description:
Execute the command only for the service with the 
provided name

options.name: --podman
options.description: Use Podman CLI instead of Docker

options.name: --replace
options.description:
Replace existing container, instead of demoting it to 
'previous'
Only works together with the '--update' option

options.name: --show-cfg
options.description: Display loaded configuration

options.name: --silent
options.description:
Don't output any messages except errors
(only outputs 0/1 depending if anything got changed or not)

options.name: --upgrade
options.description: Upgrade container if it exists

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
Output all messages, including external commands 
output

arguments.name: target
arguments.description:
Target can be either a new/existing file, or 
'display'/'screen' for outputing the sample configuration to the console 
CAUTION: if the target file exists, it will be overiden!

options.name: --body
options.description:
Email message Body as string or file (accepted formats 
are plain text and HTML)

options.name: --body-from-file
options.description:
Read Email message Body from file (default false). The 
file must be supplied to `-b|--body` option.

options.name: --config
options.description:
Config file (with absolute or relative 
path)

options.name: --from
options.description: From Address

options.name: --host
options.description: SMTP Host

options.name: --password
options.description: SMTP Password

options.name: --port
options.description: SMTP Port (default 25)

options.name: --silent
options.description:
Don't output any messages except errors
(only outputs 0/1 depending if anything got changed or not)

options.name: --subject
options.description: Email message Subject

options.name: --to
options.description: To Address

options.name: --use-ssl
options.description: Use SSL/TSL (default false)

options.name: --user
options.description: SMTP User

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
Output all messages, including external commands 
output

options.name: --ip-address
options.description: IP address to listen on (default 0.0.0.0)

options.name: --silent
options.description:
Don't output any messages except errors
(only outputs 0/1 depending if anything got changed or not)

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
Output all messages, including external commands 
output

options.description:
Don't apply any changes, just print the 
commands

options.name: --file-ext
options.description:
Process only files with these extensions (must contain 
the leading dot, i.e. '.cs')

options.name: --ignore-dir
options.description: Subdirectories to be ignored
